chunks.title: Wise Men's Journey to Bethlehem
chunks.reason: Narrative of the Magi's arrival and their inquiry about the Messiah.

chunks.title: Herod's Inquiry and the Prophecy
chunks.reason: Herod's consultation with religious leaders and their response citing Micah's prophecy.

chunks.title: Herod's Instructions to the Magi
chunks.reason: Continuation of the narrative with Herod's directive to the Magi.

chunks.title: The Magi Find the Child
chunks.reason: Describes the Magi's arrival at the house, their worship, and gift-giving.

chunks.title: Joseph's Flight to Egypt
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joseph's obedience to the angel's warning and the fulfillment of prophecy.

chunks.title: The Massacre of the Innocents and Rachel's Lament
chunks.reason: Describes Herod's massacre and the prophetic lamentation from Ramah.

chunks.title: Return from Egypt and Settlement in Nazareth
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joseph's return to Israel and settlement in Nazareth, fulfilling prophecy.
